login.heading: Sign in
login.description: Sign in with your URJC institutional credentials.

route.heading: Request a route
route.instructions: Pick origin and destination inside the highlighted perimeter (500 m around each URJC campus).

origin.label: Origin
origin.placeholder: Type an address or click on the map

destination.label: Destination
destination.placeholder: Type an address or click on the map

list.heading: Proposed routes
list.empty: Set origin and destination, then tap «Calculate route».

errors.outOfCoverage: That point is outside the coverage perimeter (500 m around the URJC campuses).
errors.missingEndpoints: You need both origin and destination before calculating a route.
errors.geocoding: Address suggestions could not be fetched. Try again.
errors.geolocationUnavailable: Your device does not support geolocation.
errors.geolocationFailed: Could not retrieve your location. Try again.
